subcodes.first_line: Praise, sanctified beyond all attributes of creation, beseemeth and befitteth that exalted True One Who, through the wondrous tokens of His bounty and generosity, hath brought forth the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از شئونات خلق حق منیعی را لایق و سزاست که از بدایع جود و کرم عالم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
